description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a light gray fabric. The sofa features three large seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniform in size. There are five accent pillows in total: two yellow, two gray, and one blue, adding a pop of color and visual interest. The armrests are gently flared and padded, providing comfort while maintaining a sleek silhouette. The sofa stands on four slender, black legs positioned at the corners, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The upholstery has a subtle, fine-textured pattern, contributing to a contemporary and inviting look suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern light gray three-seater sofa with loose cushions, colorful accent pillows, flared padded armrests, and slender black legs. The upholstery features a subtle fine-textured pattern.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, five accent pillows in yellow, gray, and blue, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the flared armrest, and the arrangement of accent pillows along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniformity of the back cushions, with all legs visible at the corners.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite armrest, accent pillows, and the sofa's slim profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size, with five loose accent pillows in varied colors arranged asymmetrically.
attribute_armrest_style: Flared, padded armrests at both ends, medium height relative to the seat, with a gently outward-angled profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, black legs positioned at the corners, straight and slightly tapered, with a metallic finish and exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three loose, uniform back cushions and no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Fine-textured, subtle geometric or woven pattern in light gray fabric, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
